# SmashMeals

> SmashMeals provides 100% gluten-free meal prep delivery, offering fresh, chef-crafted meals delivered weekly in the Tri-Cities area.

## Menu
- [Menu](https://www.smashmeals.com/menu): current rotation and nutrition info

## Agent endpoints
- [Agent Card](https://www.smashmeals.com/.well-known/agent-card.json): A2A capability manifest
- [UCP profile](https://www.smashmeals.com/.well-known/ucp): Universal Commerce Protocol profile
- [ACP profile](https://www.smashmeals.com/.well-known/acp.json): Agentic Commerce Protocol capabilities

## Contact
- [Home](https://www.smashmeals.com/): hours, location, contact info

## Optional
- [FAQs](https://www.smashmeals.com/#faq): frequently asked questions
